resources.string:
Operations tool for analyzing client-side logs.
Select a video source type to start playback. Logs during playback will be automatically injected into the log panel.
• URL: Play video via direct URL
• VidAuth: Play video via VID and PlayAuth
• VidSts: Play video via VID and STS token

After selecting a video source type, if the configuration is incomplete, you will be guided to the settings page to configure.
Video source configuration is incomplete. Please go to the settings page to configure
